title: F013 — Wheeler Participatory Universe
caption: The observer and universe are shown as mutually implicated through information, distinction, question, and response.
surroundingTextPreview: Wheeler suggested that the universe may be participatory in nature. His famous phrase ``It from Bit'' proposed that information occupies a foundational role in reality. According to Wheeler, physical phenomena may emerge from acts of distinction, measurement, and information acquisition. The observer is not necessarily external to reality.
